tickets.title: Login issue on mobile app
tickets.description: Customer unable to login using correct credentials on Android device.

tickets.title: Payment not reflecting
tickets.description: Customer completed payment but order status still pending.

tickets.title: Password reset email not received
tickets.description: User requested password reset but did not receive email.

tickets.title: App crashes on checkout
tickets.description: Application crashes when customer tries to checkout cart items.

tickets.title: Refund request for duplicate order
tickets.description: Customer accidentally placed two identical orders and requests refund.

tickets.title: Unable to update profile
tickets.description: Customer cannot update phone number in profile settings.

tickets.title: Order delivered to wrong address
tickets.description: Customer claims order was delivered to incorrect address.

tickets.title: Coupon code not working
tickets.description: Promo code applied but discount not showing.

tickets.title: Website loading very slow
tickets.description: Customer experiencing very slow loading times on homepage.

tickets.title: Account suspended without notice
tickets.description: Customer account suspended but no email notification received.

tickets.title: Incorrect invoice amount
tickets.description: Invoice shows higher amount than actual order total.

tickets.title: Notification not working
tickets.description: Push notifications are not received on iOS device.

tickets.title: Cannot download invoice PDF
tickets.description: Download button not responding when clicking invoice PDF.

tickets.title: Search feature not returning results
tickets.description: Search bar does not show relevant products.

tickets.title: Language not switching properly
tickets.description: Changing language does not update all page contents.
